pattern: A write pointer allows each unique value to appear at most twice by comparing each candidate against the element two slots behind the write head.
hints: Because the array is sorted, any third consecutive occurrence of a value must be adjacent to two earlier ones; checking two positions back from the write head detects this.
Maintain a write index k; an element nums[i] is acceptable when k < 2 or when nums[i] differs from the value two slots behind (nums[k-2]).
After the scan truncate the array to k elements so the mutated prefix is the canonical result.

edge_inputs.description: one value appearing three times gets trimmed to two
each value appears exactly twice already
all identical elements, only two survive
no duplicates at all, array unchanged

stress.description: large sorted array over small value range so many triples appear
